final:
module top_module(input VPWR, input VGND, output decap);assign decap = (VPWR == 1'b0) && (VGND == 1'b1) ? 1'b1 : 1'b0;

  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      if (VPWR == 1'b1) begin
      decap <= 1'b0;
      end
      else if (VGND == 1'b0) begin
      decap <= 1'b0;
      end
    end
  end

endmodule
